scripts.test:staging:login: cross-env TEST_ENV=staging npx playwright test tests/login.spec.js --project=chromium
scripts.test:prod:login: cross-env TEST_ENV=production npx playwright test tests/login.spec.js --project=chromium
scripts.test:docker: docker run --rm --ipc=host -v "%CD%:/app" -w /app -e BASE_URL=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com -e LOGIN_USERNAME=tomsmith -e LOGIN_PASSWORD=SuperSecretPassword! -e TEST_ENV=staging mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-noble /bin/bash -c "npm install && npx playwright test --project=chromium"
scripts.test:staging-browserstack: cross-env TEST_ENV=staging npx browserstack-node-sdk playwright test
scripts.test:prod-browserstack: cross-env TEST_ENV=production npx browserstack-node-sdk playwright test
scripts.test:staging:login-browserstack: cross-env TEST_ENV=staging npx browserstack-node-sdk playwright test tests/login.spec.js --project=chromium
scripts.test:prod:login-browserstack: cross-env TEST_ENV=production npx browserstack-node-sdk playwright test tests/login.spec.js --project=chromium
scripts.test:docker-browserstack: docker run --rm --ipc=host -v "%CD%:/app" -w /app -e BASE_URL=https://the-internet.herokuapp.com -e LOGIN_USERNAME=tomsmith -e LOGIN_PASSWORD=SuperSecretPassword! -e TEST_ENV=staging mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.59.1-noble /bin/bash -c "npm install && npx browserstack-node-sdk playwright test --project=chromium"
